puzzle.title: The First Covenant
puzzle.intro: A being of unique creation, honored above many, was placed in a garden of unparalleled beauty. Given a place of peace and a single, clear prohibition, this soul stood at a pivotal crossroads. A moment of forgetfulness, a whispered temptation, and a choice was made that would forever alter the destiny of all who came after. Can you uncover the identity of this foundational figure?
clues: I was taught the names of all things, a knowledge that distinguished me in the presence of the angels.
From me, a companion was created, and together we were told to dwell in a blissful garden.
We were granted access to all its bounties, with the sole exception of one specific tree.
A whisperer promised me an everlasting kingdom and immortality if I were to disobey.
After we transgressed, I received words of repentance from my Lord, and He turned to me in mercy.
My act of disobedience led to my descent to Earth, where I became the first of my kind and the first prophet.

location.label: What Was the Source of Deception?

puzzle.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ
puzzle.verse: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him]. (20:122)
